sections.paragraph:
Original: זוּב

Transliteration: zûb

Phonetic: zoob

BDB Definition:

  1. to flow, gush, issue, discharge
    1. (Qal)
      1. to flow, gush
      2. to die, pine away (figuratively)
      3. to flow (of issue from woman), have an issue, flux
      4. flowing (participle)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 534

Part(s) of speech: Verb
